appearances.activity: Rode tank with daughter Kim Ju Ae during live-fire army drills
Attended concert marking International Women Day in Pyongyang with daughter
Visited defense ministry compound for KPA anniversary events
Visited Memorial Museum of Overseas Military Operations construction site
Visited Kumsusan Palace of the Sun with wife Ri Sol Ju and daughter Kim Ju Ae
Visited greenhouse farm construction site near China border
Inspected Ryongsong Machine Complex in Hamhung; dismissed Vice Premier Yang Sung Ho on the spot
Inspected test firing of large-caliber rocket launcher with daughter Ju Ae
Delivered speech in North Pyongan Province
Visited Saeppyol Street housing development for families of soldiers killed in Ukraine
Unveiled 50 rocket launchers ahead of 9th Party Congress
Opened 9th Workers Party Congress; re-elected as General Secretary
Attended military parade closing 9th Party Congress with daughter Ju Ae
Inspected Choe Hyon-class destroyer; oversaw cruise missile test launch
Continued two-day destroyer shipyard inspection; pledged two warships annually
Inspected munitions factory; test-fired pistols with daughter Ju Ae
Inspected new main battle tank; oversaw infantry-tank drill and drone attack simulation
